title: Himalaya Drug Company is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Himalaya Drug Company is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
